# YourGift OS — B2B Procurement Infrastructure

> YourGift OS is enterprise procurement infrastructure for B2B companies in Portugal and Spain.
> It handles the full procurement lifecycle: quote → approval → order → production → delivery → invoice.

## What YourGift OS does

YourGift OS replaces manual B2B procurement with a structured platform that:

- Accepts RFQs (Request for Quotation) from corporate buyers
- Generates AI-assisted supplier quotes with pricing, lead times and landed cost
- Routes approvals through configurable budget hierarchies
- Manages branded merchandise orders with artwork proofing
- Tracks production stages and shipping in real time
- Issues invoices, tracks payments and generates ROI reports for CFOs

## Who uses it

- **Corporate Procurement Teams** — HR, Marketing, Operations buyers at mid-to-large companies
- **Procurement Managers** — who need budget visibility, supplier performance and compliance reporting
- **CFOs / Finance** — who need spend consolidation, savings tracking and audit trails
- **Employees** — who access curated company stores to order branded merchandise within policy

## Core capabilities

### Procurement
- Multi-supplier RFQ with automated comparison tables
- AI-powered quote analysis and recommendation engine
- Budget hierarchy: individual → team → department → company limits
- Approval workflows with escalation and delegation
- PO generation, order confirmation, supplier communication

### Suppliers
- Midocean and PF Concept catalog integration (50,000+ products)
- Real-time stock sync and availability checking
- Carrier integrations: DHL, DPD, GLS, UPS, FedEx
- Landed cost calculation (product + shipping + customs + duties)
- Supplier performance scoring and reliability metrics

### Finance
- Double-entry ledger for all procurement transactions
- Stripe payment processing with fraud detection (Radar)
- Invoice lifecycle management (draft → sent → paid → reconciled)
- Multi-currency support with live FX rates
- Period-based financial aggregation with CFO-ready PDF reports

### AI & Intelligence
- Procurement decision engine with predicted vs actual tracking
- AI brief parsing to extract product specs from natural language
- Benchmark reports: compare your pricing vs market rates
- Spend pattern analysis and savings opportunity identification

### Enterprise Identity
- JWT-based authentication with refresh token rotation
- Google OAuth + OIDC SSO (Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, Auth0)
- SCIM 2.0 automated provisioning (RFC 7643/7644) — Okta + Azure AD compatible
- SAML 2.0 scaffold (passport-saml integration pending)
- Role-based access: admin, manager, buyer, viewer
- Multi-tenant isolation with per-tenant rate limiting
- Per-tenant SSO configuration with email domain routing

### Operations
- 16-queue BullMQ job system backed by Redis (Upstash)
- Dead Letter Queue with manual replay for failed jobs
- Sentry error tracking with distributed tracing
- Structured JSON logging with correlation IDs
- Health checks at /api/v1/health

## API

Base URL: https://yourgift-api.onrender.com/api/v1
Docs (non-production): /docs (Swagger UI)

Authentication: Bearer JWT token in Authorization header
All responses: { success: boolean, data: T, meta: { requestId, ts } }

Key endpoints:
- POST /auth/login                                    — email/password auth
- POST /auth/google                                   — Google OAuth
- GET  /enterprise-identity/oidc/:tenantId/login      — initiate OIDC SSO
- GET  /scim/v2/tenants/:tenantId/Users               — SCIM user provisioning
- GET  /products                                      — browse catalog
- POST /quotes                                        — create RFQ
- GET  /quotes/:id                                    — quote with pricing breakdown
- POST /logistics/landed-cost                         — calculate landed cost
- POST /decision-engine/card                          — procurement decision card
- POST /orders                                        — place order
- GET  /orders/:id                                    — track order status
- GET  /analytics/spend                               — spend dashboard data
- GET  /intelligence/suppliers/:id/trust              — supplier trust score
- POST /intelligence/roi                              — generate CFO ROI report
- GET  /admin/queues                                  — queue health (admin only)

## Technology stack

- **API**: NestJS 10, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL (Supabase)
- **Web**: Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Admin**: Next.js 14, enterprise dashboard
- **Queue**: BullMQ + Redis (Upstash), 16 named queues
- **Payments**: Stripe (checkout, webhooks, Radar fraud)
- **Email**: Resend
- **Storage**: AWS S3 + CloudFront
- **Observability**: Sentry, structured JSON logs
- **Hosting**: Render (API), Vercel (web + admin)
- **CI/CD**: GitHub Actions, pnpm workspaces, Turborepo

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://www.yourgift.pt
- API: https://yourgift-api.onrender.com
- Admin: https://admin.yourgift.pt
- GitHub: https://github.com/cfeiteira73-cmd/yourgift
